name: P3.2 对数与指数函数
subject: math
curriculum_points: • understand the relationship between logarithms and indices, and use the laws of logarithms (excluding change of base)
• understand the definition and properties of e^x and ln x, including their relationship as inverse functions and their graphs
• use logarithms to solve equations and inequalities in which the unknown appears in indices
• use logarithms to transform a given relationship to linear form, and hence determine unknown constants by considering the gradient and/or intercept.

excerpts.text: • understand the relationship between logarithms and indices, and use the laws of logarithms (excluding change of base)
• understand the definition and properties of e^x and ln x, including their relationship as inverse functions and their graphs
• use logarithms to solve equations and inequalities in which the unknown appears in indices
• use logarithms to transform a given relationship to linear form, and hence determine unknown constants by considering the gradient and/or intercept.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「P3.2 对数与指数函数」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：• understand the relationship between logarithms and indices, and use the laws of logarithms (excluding change of base)…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• understand the definition and properties of e^x and ln x, including their rela… 对理解「P3.2 对数与指数函数」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
